name: Aspargus Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a 1-quart saucepan, heat 2 tablespoons olive oil over medium-low heat. Add shallot and cook about 6 minutes, until golden. Remove from heat.
3. In a blender, process bread to fine crumbs; or tear bread into small crumbs. Spread crumbs in a jelly-roll pan and bake 3 to 6 minutes, until golden. Set aside.
4. In a 12-inch skillet, bring 1 inch of boiling water to a boil. Add asparagus and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, uncovered, for 5 to 10 minutes, just until asparagus is tender. Drain.
5. Place asparagus in a shallow broiler-safe dish. Drizzle with remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil.
